title: Dates
bodyHtml:
• 2022

    Friday 5th August
    Live at Kilkenny Arts Festival, Cleare's Theatre, Kilkenny

    Monday 6th – Saturday 11th June
    Sounding Seams III: Residency, concert & workshops at the Irish National Heritage Park, Ferrycarrig, Wexford

  • 2026

    Wednesday 2nd September

    Kaleidoscope Night

    A live performance of new works - either solo, or with some or all of fellow Clang Sayne players - details tbc!

  • Danish Tour February 2019

    Monday 25th February: 5E, Slagtehusgade, Copenhagen

    Wednesday 27th February Headquarters Musikbar | Valdemarsgade 1, 8000 Aarhus C. Denmark | Support from Jenni Hanikka (FIN)

    Thursday 28th February Lutter Ore | Dronningens Tværgade 52, 1302 København K Denmark

    Friday 1st March: Tojhuset | Fredericia Gothersgade 34, 7000 Fredericia, Denmark

  • EU Tour November 2018

    Friday 23rd November | Klaeng Festival | Cologne, Germany

    Thursday 22nd November | Le Cercle Du Voyageur presented by Mondocultures

  • Summer Tour Ireland 2018

    Wednesday 8th August 8pm | Wexford Arts Centre | Cornmarket, Wexford | Tickets from Ticketsolve

    Thursday 9th August 8pm | St Patrick's Gateway | Patrick Street Waterford , X91 YX61 | Tickets coming soon

    Friday 10th August 7pm | Sirius Suppers Series | Meal and concert in Sirius Arts Centre, Cobh

    Saturday 11th August | Adventures in Music | County Galway (venue tbc) .

    Sunday 12th August | Adventures in Music | Black Gate Cultural Centre, Galway city.

    Monday 13th August | 8pm | Ergodos HQ, Rathmines, Dublin 6 | Double bill with improvising trombonist, Colm O Hara & co. | €10

  • Summer Tour UK 2018

    Tuesday 24th July 7pm| NAWR ANOIS Concert Series feat. Aonghus McEvoy | BBC Hall Swansea Studios UWTSD | Tickets £8 / 5

    Wednesday 25th July 8.30pm | The Prince Albert Inn | Rodborough Hill, Stroud, GL5 3SS Stroud, UK

    Thursday 26th July 7pm Cafe Kino | with Yama Warashi (solo set), and stage design by It's All pretty Wild | 108 Stokes Croft, Bristol, BS1 3RU | £10 tickets on the door

    Saturday 30th September 8pm | Alice's Restaurant | The Moate Mall, Main Street , Naas, Co. Kildare | Tickets from Merakindie

    Friday 29th September 9pm | Hard Working Class Heroes Festival | Kennedy's, 30-32 Westland Row Dublin 2 | Tickets from Eventbrite

    Wednesday 27th September 8pm | Santa Rita Series | Little Museum of Dublin, 15 St Stephen's Green, Dublin 2. | Tickets from Ergodos
